title: Push Chain Schema Index
description: Index of all JSON Schema definitions for Push Chain data structures

schemas.name: UniversalTransactionRequest
schemas.description: Schema for the transaction object passed to pushChainClient.universal.sendTransaction()

schemas.name: UniversalTransactionResponse
schemas.description: Schema for the TxResponse object returned by sendTransaction()

schemas.name: TransactionReceipt
schemas.description: Schema for receipt from tx.wait() or trackTransaction result

schemas.name: UniversalAccount
schemas.description: Schema for UniversalAccount object containing address and chain

schemas.name: UniversalSigner
schemas.description: Schema for UniversalSigner extending UniversalAccount with signing capabilities
